case_title: MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY VS. LA CLASS TRANSPORTATION, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-12-2018 CONTINUED TO JAN-09-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT LA CLASS TRANSPORTATION, LLC SIMMONS, RLAINIUS DOES 1 TO 5 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-12-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-16-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-20-2018
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 100035538) AS TO DEFENDANT SIMMONS, RLAINIUS
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100037259) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $300.45 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100040857) AS TO DEFENDANT SIMMONS, RLAINIUS
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100040857) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5 INCLUSIVE
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100040465) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIMMONS, RLAINIUS $1,797.44 PRINCIPAL, $286.11 INTEREST, $300.45 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,384.00, SEE SCANNED DOC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-19-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT LA CLASS TRANSPORTATION, LLC SIMMONS, RLAINIUS
DECLARATION RE: SUPERIOR COURT FILING CCP 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 100040857) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100040857) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100034606), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED MAY-26-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SIMMONS, RLAINIUS
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100035431) AS TO DEFENDANT LA CLASS TRANSPORTATION, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-19-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE JAN-09-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
